name: Battlers Of Ekrasys
short_description: An idle auto-battler hero builder all about experimentation. Defeat waves of monsters and bosses to learn their spells! Craft jewels, enhance them with the smithmagic system, and fuse over 90 unique abilities to discover powerful synergies and evolve your build.
detailed_description:
Battlers Of Ekrasys
A deep, text-based autobattler RPG where strategy meets endless progression! Fight, Loot, Craft new spells and jewels, and master the art of the Smithmagic using a runes system !

I’m passionate about theorycrafting—if you are too, you’re going to love this!

The game is really grindy and idle based !

🌀 How Does It Work?

  • Choose 5 spells from your collection – they will cycle endlessly in battle.

  • Defeat monsters, earn loot, and instantly face new foes.

  • Every X waves, a boss appears – test your build’s strength!

  • Learn new spells from fallen monsters and expand your arsenal.

🛠️ Deep Crafting & Customization

  • Experiment by fusing spells to create a mix of those spells.

  • Craft powerful jewels with randomly generated prefixes & suffixes.

  • Use Smithmagic to modify your gear – upgrade and optimize your stats.

  • Loot materials to craft new items and improve your build.

📈 Progression That Never Stops

  • Earn XP & level up to unlock stronger spells, and stronger resources for your craft.

  • Upgrade your stats, master resistances, and break through wave after wave of enemies.

  • Experiment with different spell synergies and item builds to dominate the battlefield!

🖥️ Minimalist, Engaging Gameplay

  • Pure text-based combat with a clean UI and deep strategy.

  • Idle mechanics allow you to progress even when AFK.

⚔️ Ready to Begin Your Journey?
Add Battlers Of Ekrasys to your wishlist and prepare to dive into an infinite RPG adventure unlike any other!
